# 1/3-2/3 Conjecture — Roadmap

*Generated by pm-onethird on 2026-05-14 17:00 BST (evening sweep). Manual edits will be overwritten on next sweep — push back via OVERRIDE mail or by editing the PM config.*

## Headline — the general-n proof is now conditional on (UCC.2) ALONE

The Compatibility-Geometry arc reduced **width-3 Kahn–Saks 1/3-2/3 at general n** to a single master hypothesis (UCC) — gap-free (F10, GREEN-conditional). Today F17 **proved (UCC.1) unconditionally for all n**. The F10 cohomological core's conditionality has narrowed from `{(UCC.1), (UCC.2)}` to **`{(UCC.2)}` alone**. F18 (mg-d039) attacks (UCC.2) directly. **If F18 closes, the width-3 1/3-2/3 conjecture is proven at general n** (modulo the separate Lean 4-axiom trust surface).

`width3_one_third_two_thirds` is hypothesis-free on `origin/main` since 2026-05-05. Trust surface: **4 axioms** (case3 + Brightwell + Stanley-temp + cellMass_AD-temp) + 5 native_decide — **unchanged all day** (the entire F-series is paper-level structural cohomology; no new axioms, no Lean changes).

## Trajectory
- **1/3-2/3:** decisive convergence. The arc spent today methodically eliminating dead routes to (FG-Cofiber) — route (i) closed-negative (F11), route (ii) closed-negative (F15+F16) — then F17's option-3 pivot landed GREEN-MAJOR and proved (UCC.1) outright. Net: the general-n proof went from "conditional on (UCC)" to "conditional on (UCC.2) alone" in one day. The negatives were clean, fast, and decisive (not complexity blow-ups) — healthy narrowing. F10's GREEN-conditional headline held intact throughout. F18 is the last gap.
- **Process:** the F-series was scattered across ~39 unmerged branches (dispatch-side bug, now fixed) — consolidated to main today via mg-1ea3.

## Sister product line — Union-Closed (Frankl), `union_closed` repo

New product line, Daniel-assigned 2026-05-14: pursue the Union-Closed Sets conjecture via compatibility geometry. Repo `union_closed` (drellem2/union_closed) stood up today.

- **In flight: mg-cfc0 — UC3** — the sub-cube Walsh spectrum relative to a minimal generator (fallback F-i, UC2-localized). High priority, 350k, multi-session. Filed 2026-05-14 17:00.
- **Shipped: mg-f72a — UC1 — AMBER-partial-transfer** — the compatibility-geometry *framework* transfers to Frankl (intrinsic object = Boolean cube + transport graph + Walsh spectrum), but *decoupled from both 1/3-2/3 engines* — Union-Closed needs a native engine, and has a native harmonic (Walsh) handle.
- **Shipped: mg-a814 — UC2 — GREEN-structure-theory** — the coordinate-transport structure theory; the trace-partition theorem localizes the entire residual difficulty of Frankl to the intermediate trace-classes of a minimal generator of size ≥ 3 — Frankl's known frontier, reproduced from inside the compatibility-geometry framework. UC3 attacks exactly that, via the sub-cube Walsh spectrum.
- *Trajectory:* launched and viable in one day — UC1 founded the framework, UC2 built the first native structure theory and localized the difficulty precisely, UC3 is the first real attack. UC1/UC2 deliverables: UC1 is on `union_closed` main; UC2 is a pending fold-in (mayor follow-up).
